candidates.why: Direct top-line revenue label; appears twice in the preview and is the only clear revenue line among candidates.
Balance sheet liability, not revenue recognized on the income statement.
Balance sheet asset, not top-line revenue.
Balance sheet asset, not top-line revenue.

variables.notes: R:nc. Selected 'Operating revenue' as the clear revenue line. Manual review flagged because the Income Statement preview contains two separate rows with the exact same label 'Operating revenue' but different values in some years, creating ambiguity about which occurrence downstream code will capture.

candidates.row_label: Stock-Based Compensation in Cost of Revenue
candidates.why: This is only a narrow component of cost of revenue, not full COGS/cost of sales.

candidates.row_label: Materials to be Used during Ops.
candidates.why: Inventory-related balance sheet item, not income statement COGS expense.

variables.notes: No full cost of goods sold/cost of sales row is visible on the provided Income Statement. The candidate 'Stock-Based Compensation in Cost of Revenue' is only a partial component and should not be used as total COGS.

candidates.why: Clear overhead component and a strong SG&A-type cost bucket.
R&D-related row appears above operating profit; include in XSGA as well when not clearly embedded in broader SG&A so that XSGA-XRD works correctly.
Explicit SG&A label exists, but preview values are empty; per rules it can still be relevant historically.
Would be an SG&A component, but no visible values and less comprehensive than other rows.
Balance sheet asset, not SG&A expense.

variables.notes: R:c. Used the explicit SG&A row plus overhead buckets because 'Selling, General & Administrative Expenses' exists but appears empty in the preview, which under the rules warrants adding another overhead bucket for coverage. Added 'Employee benefits expense' and 'Operating Expense' as likely operating-overhead components. Added 'Research & Development Expense - Capitalized' as well so that XSGA_COMPONENTS - XRD removes R&D if reported separately. Manual review is required because 'Operating Expense' was selected from the full preview outside the candidate list, and the statement structure makes it unclear whether some overhead is already embedded across these rows. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Operating Expense

candidates.why: Only explicit R&D-related income statement line; appears above operating profit.
Balance sheet asset, not R&D expense.

variables.notes: Mapped to the dedicated R&D-related income statement row above operating profit.

candidates.why: Most granular recurring interest expense line; preferred over broader finance cost total.
Recurring finance-cost component in some years; can be combined with interest cost when finance costs are split.
Broader total that appears to aggregate interest cost and other financial expense; avoid if components are selected.
Semantically correct but appears empty in preview.
Not finance cost.
Not finance cost.
Equity/NCI item, not finance cost.
Equity/NCI item, not finance cost.

variables.notes: Selected granular recurring finance-cost components instead of the broader 'Finance costs' total to avoid double counting.

candidates.why: Best direct book equity line excluding non-controlling interest; preferred over Total Equity when NCI is separately reported.
Includes non-controlling interest when separately reported, so less preferred.
Component of equity, not full book equity.
Component/unclear, not full equity.

candidates.row_label: Net profit/(loss) for Equity holders of the parent
candidates.why: Income statement profit line, not balance sheet book equity.

candidates.row_label: Total comprehensive income attributable to equity holders
candidates.why: Income statement OCI total, not book equity stock.

candidates.row_label: Sale of Discontinued Operations -Gain on distribution of Hermana ASA to shareholders
candidates.why: Gain line, not equity.
Unclear and not a balance sheet total equity line.

variables.notes: Preferred owner/shareholder equity line, which excludes non-controlling interest and therefore avoids double counting with MIB.

candidates.why: Direct balance sheet NCI line; preferred for minority interest.
Alternative balance sheet label for the same concept.
Income statement attribution line, not balance sheet minority equity stock.
Income statement attribution line, not balance sheet minority equity stock.

candidates.row_label: Total comprehensive income attributable to non-controlling interest
candidates.why: Income statement OCI attribution, not balance sheet minority equity.

variables.notes: Used balance sheet non-controlling interest labels as a priority list for years where wording may vary.
